/usr/bin/ar qc liboutpost_lib.a CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/common/event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/common/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/common/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/ingestion/syslog_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/ingestion/ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/ingestion/http_poller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/parser/fortigate_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/parser/syslog_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/parser/windows_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/parser/m365_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/parser/azure_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/storage/postgres_storage_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/storage/retention.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/rules/rule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/rules/rule_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_lib.dir/src/api/server.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboutpost_lib.a
